hook: A useful exclusivity conversation should leave both people clearer, even if the answer is not perfect.
body: The goal is not to force the right outcome but to reduce fantasy and reveal where each person truly stands.

hook: Many people avoid these talks because they fear disappointment more than confusion.
body: Disappointment can hurt, but confusion prolonged tends to cost more over time.

body: Learning that someone is not ready may sting, but it still helps you make a cleaner decision than staying in indefinite limbo.
